mode_note: Set to 'apply' (live mode). The agent will create labels and archive routine mail. VIPs are always flagged, never auto-actioned. To revert: change to 'dry-run' and push — next run will only describe what it would do.
lookback_note: Slightly larger than the 30-min cron so a missed run doesn't drop mail. Increase to 24h for a one-off catch-up run.

discord_webhook.note: URL passed via trigger bootstrap as DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL env var. Kept out of the repo so this file can stay public.

schedule.watcher_cron_note: Every 30 min, Mon-Fri 8am-6pm ET (EDT). Update to '*/30 13-23 * * 1-5' when EST kicks in November.
schedule.audit_cron_note: Sundays 9am ET (EDT). Reads weekly-audit-prompt.md instead of prompt.md.
